_doc: Acceptance probes — empirical checks the agent MUST run before claiming 'PASS / DONE / VERIFIED'. Read by .claude/hooks/evidence_audit.py at Stop. If a probe-required claim is made without at least one matching MCP tool call in the same turn, the Stop is BLOCKED.

applies_when.claim_regex: regex on assistant text — if matched, this probe contract activates (default: catches 'pass|passed|done|verified|works|hoàn thành|đã test|đã verify')
applies_when.path_globs: optional list of file globs — if a turn's Edit/Write touched any matching path, probe is required even without explicit claim words
applies_when.task_tags: optional list — agent can declare current task tag via [task: X] in response; probe required if tag matches

evidence.required_tools: list of MCP tool names (mcp__<server>__<tool>) — at least ONE must appear in this turn for the claim to pass
evidence.min_calls: integer (default 1) — minimum number of evidence tool calls required
evidence.must_include_call: optional regex on tool input — e.g. expression must contain 'search_count' for orm probes; if missing, evidence doesn't count
evidence.required_result_fingerprint: optional sha256 of expected tool_result content — catches dummy MCP calls (e.g. eval_orm_expression('1+1') won't match fingerprint of real query result)

falsification.description: human-readable hypothesis-falsification step. Runner sub-block configures mechanical execution via `.codex/tools/falsify.py`. Supported runner types: `timing_perturb` (inject sleep, measure delta), `side_effect_inject` (marker file detection), `log_assertion` (regex on command output), `playwright` (spawn npx playwright test, parse JSON reporter).

_schema.severity: blocker (deny stop, force re-verify) | warn (allow + inject reminder)
_schema.rationale: why this probe must run — surfaced in block message

_workflow: 1. User describes a verifiable behavior: 'this request must BLOCK the UI'.
2. Run /adr-add to capture WHY in decision-log.md.
3. Run /probe-add to translate the behavior into a probe entry (claim_regex, required MCP tools, falsification recipe).
4. The Stop hook now BLOCKS any 'PASS/DONE' claim that doesn't include at least one matching MCP tool call.
5. Bypass single-shot: add 'probe-skip: <probe-id> <reason>' line to the response. Tracked for audit.

_defaults._doc: Fallback contract when no probe matches but a PASS-class claim is detected. This is the LOOSE generic guard — strict per-feature probes override this when claim_regex matches.
_defaults._pass_exempt_doc: Response markers that fully exempt PASS-claim contract AND generic claim audit (but NOT progress checks). Use when the response is a meta-analysis of the toolkit/agent-system itself.
_defaults._progress_checks_doc: Hallucinated-progress categories enforced by evidence_audit.py. List category names here to disable per-project. Valid names: action_ghost, tool_result_fabrication, phantom_citation, todo_inconsistency, overcount. Bypass single-shot via 'progress-skip: <category|all> <reason>' in the response.
